---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug to help us improve the game
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Description

A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Screenshots / Video

If applicable, add screenshots or video to help explain the problem.

## Environment

- **Platform**: [e.g. Web/Windows/Linux/macOS]
- **Browser** (if Web): [e.g. Chrome 120, Firefox 121]
- **Game Version**: [e.g. v0.1.0, shown in bottom-right of main menu]
- **Controller** (if applicable): [e.g. Xbox, PlayStation, keyboard only]
- **OS Version**: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04]

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem.
